race.description: Shaw Gidley & River City Form Pty Ltd Hcp (Bm64)
race.comment: PRINCESS CRUIZER (7) has contested a couple of 900m scampers of late and found the opposition too slick. Has raced here over 1200m nine times for seven top three finishes. In the right race to bounce back to form. ROMA GREEN (4) tasted defeat for the first time when fresh from a spell over 1250m at Canterbury recently. Fitter and capable of sharp improvement. COBRA CLUB (2) is a speedy gelding resuming for the Waterhouse & Bott camp. Strips fitter for two trials and will prove tough to reel in if left alone in front. SILENCIO PORFAVOR (5) is rock-hard fit and can sneak a minor spot with the right run. 3kg claim helps his chances.
